name: AppSumo Lifetime Deal Monitor with ScrapeOps and Google Sheets

parameters.content:
# 🛍️ AppSumo Lifetime Deal Monitor → Google Sheets

This workflow automatically tracks AppSumo lifetime deals daily. It fetches the AppSumo browse page using **ScrapeOps Proxy with JS rendering**, parses each deal into structured data, filters by your target categories, and saves new or updated deals to Google Sheets with full deduplication.

### How it works
1. ⏰ **Daily Schedule Trigger** fires every day at 09:00 automatically.
2. 🌐 **Fetch AppSumo Deals via ScrapeOps** loads the browse page with JavaScript rendering enabled.
3. 🔍 **Parse AppSumo Deals HTML → Structured JSON** extracts name, URL, category, prices, discount, rating, reviews, image, and timestamps.
4. 🔎 **Filter Relevant Deal Categories** keeps only deals matching your target keywords.
5. 📋 **Lookup Deal in Google Sheet (by URL)** checks if the deal already exists in your sheet.
6. 🔀 **Merge Scrape + Existing Row** combines scraped data with any existing sheet row.
7. 🔀 **IF New Deal** routes new vs. existing deals to separate write paths.
8. 💾 **Append New Deal to Sheet** adds a fresh row for new deals.
9. 🔄 **Update Existing Deal Row** refreshes pricing and status for known deals.

### Setup steps
- Register for a free ScrapeOps API key: https://scrapeops.io/app/register/n8n
- Add ScrapeOps credentials in n8n. Docs: https://scrapeops.io/docs/n8n/overview/
- [Duplicate the Google Sheet](https://docs.google.com/spreadsheets/d/1L_Fn_wm55wc5EXi_ZIVmmXyFrz9nJ-29Xd71Ndz_XIk/edit#gid=0") and paste your Sheet URL into the Lookup, Append, and Update nodes.
- Edit the category/keyword list in **Filter Relevant Deal Categories** to match your interests.
- Run once manually to confirm, then activate.

### Customization
- Add Slack, Gmail, or Discord alerts on the **New Deal** path.
- Change the schedule time in the trigger node to suit your timezone.

## 1. Trigger & Fetch
Runs daily at 09:00 and loads the AppSumo browse page via [ScrapeOps Proxy](https://scrapeops.io/docs/n8n/proxy-api/) with JavaScript rendering enabled.

## 2. Parse Deals
Extracts title, URL, prices, discount, category, rating, reviews, image, status, and timestamps from the raw HTML into clean structured JSON.

## 3. Filter by Category
Keeps only deals that match your target categories or keywords. Edit the list inside this node to customize what gets tracked.

## 4. Deduplicate & Merge
Looks up each deal by its AppSumo URL in Google Sheets, then merges scraped data with any existing row to enrich the record.

## 5. Route & Write to Google Sheets
New deals are appended as fresh rows. Existing deals have their price, status, and timestamps updated in place.
